message:
chore(beads): re-close 19 beads reverted by JSONL drift again

Per memory feedback_br_sync_drift, prior closes keep getting
clobbered by other agents' br sync flushes from stale SQLite.
Re-closing via direct JSONL edit. The underlying code fixes are
unaffected — verified each fix is still in HEAD.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
